title: Machines & Vehicles
goal: Name common site machines and vehicles and talk about their use.

completionCriteria.summary: Finish the quiz with at least 80%.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: The crane will lift the steel bars.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: It is digging the ground over there.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.line: When does the truck bring the sand?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: At ten. The mixer will make the concrete.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.line: Can the forklift carry these bricks?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: Yes, but drive slowly and be careful.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.line: I need to reach the roof.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.line: Use the ladder. Climb it carefully.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.line: Okay. Please turn off the engine first.

multipleChoice.prompt: Which machine lifts heavy steel to high places?
multipleChoice.explanation: A crane lifts heavy things high up.

multipleChoice.prompt: You want to reach the roof. Use the ___.
multipleChoice.explanation: A ladder helps you climb up.

multipleChoice.prompt: Before you leave the machine, you should turn off the ___.
multipleChoice.explanation: Turn off the engine for safety.

fillBlank.prompt: The ___ lifts the heavy steel to the top.
fillBlank.explanation: A crane lifts heavy loads high.

fillBlank.prompt: The ___ brings the sand to the site.
Climb the ___ carefully to reach the roof.
fillBlank.explanation: A ladder is used to climb.

matching.instruction: Match the word to its meaning.
Match the word to its meaning.
